units.title: Peaceful studio condo on a private beach with full kitchen
units.desc: Peaceful studio condo on a private beach with full kitchen. Everything you need for a relaxing South Florida beach vacation.

units.title: Ocean front with AMAZING Ocean view
units.desc: Completely remodeled studio — queen Murphy bed, sleeper sofa, full bathroom, fully equipped kitchen, flat screen TV with cable, A/C and free WiFi.

units.title: Full Remodel, Direct Beachfront Corner Unit!
units.desc: A great escape for a couple, a girls' getaway weekend, or a business person in need of a better view. Open the windows and let the sound of the ocean waves lull you to sleep.

units.title: Ocean view, cozy, direct access to beautiful beach
units.desc: Ocean view, cozy studio with direct access to one of the most beautiful beaches in South Florida. Steps to shops and restaurants.

units.title: Direct Oceanfront Escape with Spectacular Views!
units.desc: Wake up to golden sunrises over the Atlantic as you sip coffee listening to the waves. Perfect for a couple's romantic getaway or a serene retreat.

units.title: Oceanfront condo
units.desc: Our tiny beloved family apartment in front of the ocean. Located directly on the beach, cozy with a breathtaking ocean view — the perfect getaway.

units.title: Studio Apt Right on the Beach!
units.desc: Enjoy all the creature comforts of home by staying at our vacation studio rental on the beach, just 50 steps to the sand! Very comfortable queen size bed.

units.title: Tipsy Turtles Pool, Peekaboo Ocean View, Beach
units.desc: Welcome to Tipsy Turtles. A fun, laid-back beach escape in Lauderdale by the Sea. Enjoy a peekaboo ocean view, refreshing pool, and just a turtle trek to the sand. Relax and soak up the coastal vibe, close to everything you need for your stay. Bright, clean, and a light coastal feel ideal for guests seeking comfort and convenience in a prime beach location.

units.title: Ocean View Paradise Beach Front
units.desc: Beautiful Studio with Unobstructed Views directly on the Beach! Contemporary clean sleek look, completely equipped kitchen, travertine marble floors.

units.title: Paradise by the Seaside
units.desc: Studio provides a murphy bed and sofa bed, complete kitchen, dining table, closet. Large window overlooking the pool provides plenty of natural light.

units.title: Beachfront Studio With Ocean View
units.desc: Recently remodeled beachfront studio with ocean view, ready to enjoy on your next vacation. Located on the third floor overlooking the pool.

units.title: Condo w/ Private Beach Access
units.desc: Beachfront Escape | 1BR Condo, 575 SF. The only true 1-bedroom in the building with private beach access in Lauderdale-by-the-Sea!

units.title: Paradise awaits you
units.desc: Take it easy at this unique and tranquil getaway. This unique gem is facing the ocean! No lobby — walk out of the unit steps away from the ocean!

units.title: Direct beautiful beach and ocean view
units.desc: Beautiful ocean view from the unit, right on the beach. Great location near restaurants, shops, and many attractions.

units.title: Beach Escape
units.desc: One queen size bed and one queen size pull out couch — both brand new! Relax steps from the sand in this cozy beachfront studio.

units.title: Direct Oceanfront Studio in Lauderdale by the Sea
units.desc: Available as a short-term rental for the very first time. Beautifully updated — from the moment you walk in, you will want to stay forever.

units.title: StudioBTS — Right on the beach!
units.desc: Located right on the beach, our studio offers everything you need for a peaceful getaway.

units.title: Beachfront Lauderdale-by-the-Sea — Pool King Bed
units.desc: Condo directly on the beach. 2nd floor unit facing the pool with a glimpse of the ocean.

units.title: A LITTLE PIECE OF HEAVEN — Beachfront Studio
units.desc: Queen size bed, full size kitchen, large closet and separate linen closet. All linens and kitchenware included. Near shopping and restaurants.

units.title: International Sand Dollar — Ocean View!
units.desc: Beautiful ocean view unit! Refreshing pool, kitchen with full size appliances, queen bed, 42" Smart TV. Free parking for 1 standard size vehicle.

units.title: Oceanfront! Clean and Cozy, Free Wi-Fi
units.desc: Beautiful furnished oceanfront 1 bedroom apartment directly on the beach with amazing ocean views and breezes of Lauderdale-by-the-Sea.

units.title: Beach Condo — Building on sand! Monthly Specials!
units.desc: Studio with nicely equipped kitchen, queen size Murphy bed, dressing room with vanity and closet. Steps to the beach.

units.title: Charming Fully Furnished One Bedroom
units.desc: Prime oceanfront spot with direct beach access, steps to the sand, pool views, and a relaxed coastal vibe. Also available for extended stays.

units.title: Gorgeous studio steps from the sand
units.desc: Studio on the sand completely remodeled. First floor, great for couples, singles and small families. Fully furnished and equipped kitchenette.

units.title: Oceanfront studio: kitchen, pool
units.desc: Welcome to your perfect getaway at our Ocean Front Studio! Nestled in an exquisite beachfront location, this charming 375 sq. ft. studio offers stunning coastal views.

units.title: SALTY SUNRISE Beachfront Studio
units.desc: Your cozy getaway awaits at The International — recently updated beachfront studio right on the beach, ground floor overlooking the relaxing pool view.

units.title: Studio steps away from the ocean!
units.desc: Our private studio offers a very comfortable and relaxing atmosphere. Relax on the beach or pool while taking in some Florida sun. Expect beautiful sunsets!
